title: euphorbia barnhartii
intro: Euphorbia barnhartii, also known as the 'Diamond in the Sky' or 'Crown of Thorns,' is a succulent plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Euphorbia barnhartii has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its latex, which contains a compound called ingenol mebutate, used in treating certain skin conditions such as actinic keratosis and squamous cell carcinoma. The plant's latex has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and even certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia barnhartii are often used in topical creams, ointments, and gels to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
